mapper.select: SELECT id, name, user_id, start_time, end_time, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM distribution_subscriptions WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY id DESC

SELECT id, name, user_id, start_time, end_time, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM distribution_subscriptions WHERE deleted = 0
AND name LIKE '%' || #{name} || '%'
ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT id, name, user_id, start_time, end_time, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM distribution_subscriptions WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT id, name, user_id, start_time, end_time, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM distribution_subscriptions WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT count(1) FROM distribution_subscriptions WHERE deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO distribution_subscriptions (name, user_id, start_time, end_time, created_at, updated_at, deleted) VALUES (#{name}, #{userId}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE distribution_subscriptions SET name = #{name}, user_id = #{userId}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
